_meta.note: Leads attributed to the clinic that did NOT book an SC. GMB=clinic GMB number/campaign (call+web). Everyone else = a caller whose AI-audit named THIS clinic (is_our_locality), attributed by the lead's real source: Google Ads(paid), Organic, Meta, Practo, or Other (justdial/referral/direct/untracked). Web leads that never call carry only the city → excluded.
